channel.title: briefUpdatesMainNLbreakingNews
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from briefUpdatesMainNLbreakingNews, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: GOP Rep. Lawler says image posted by Trump mocking Obamas was 'racist'
item.description: New York Republican Congressman Mike Lawler doubled down on his criticism of a racist social media post from President Donald Trump's account.

item.title: WATCH: 3 rescued after falling through icy waters
item.description: Members of the NYPD and the FDNY rescued three men who fell through the ice in Queens. They were treated at local hospitals.

item.title: WATCH: New clues emerge in Nancy Guthrie abduction case
item.description: The family of Nancy Guthrie is pleading for her safe return a week after the 84-year-old was allegedly abducted from her home in Tucson, Arizona.

item.title: Open: This is "Face the Nation with Margaret Brennan," Feb. 8, 2026
item.description: As Washington turns its eyes toward the upcoming midterm elections and the Trump administration moderates its tone on deportations while ramping up ef...

item.title: Savannah Guthrie in new video pleads for mother's return: 'We will pay'
item.description: "Today" show host Savannah Guthrie and her siblings released a new video saying they have received a message and begged for their mother's return.

item.title: Savannah Guthrie says "we will pay" in new plea for mother's safe return
item.description: Savannah Guthrie released a new video​ on Saturday, saying her family is willing to pay for the safe return of their mother.

item.title: This week on "Sunday Morning" (Feb. 8)
item.description: A look at the features for this week's broadcast of the Emmy-winning program, hosted by Jane Pauley.

item.title: Starmer's aide quits over ambassador appointment despite Epstein links
item.description: British Prime Minister Keir Starmer's chief of staff, Morgan McSweeney, said he took responsibility for advising Starmer to appoint Peter Mandelson.

item.title: Nature: Fort Niobrara National Wildlife Refuge in Nebraska
item.description: For all the romantics: This Sunday, we leave you in Fort Niobrara National Wildlife Refuge - just 5 miles east of Valentine, Nebraska. Videographer: K...

item.title: WATCH: Savannah Guthrie in new video pleads for mother's return: 'We will pay'
item.description: "Today" show host Savannah Guthrie and her siblings released a new video on Saturday saying they have received a message and begged for the return of ...

item.title: Trump’s racist post about Obamas is deleted after backlash despite White House earlier defending it
Savannah Guthrie’s demand for mom’s ‘proof of life’ is complicated in this era of AI and deepfakes
Sheriff searching for Savannah Guthrie’s missing mom calls lack of video a disappointing setback
item.description: The sheriff investigating the apparent abduction of “Today” show host Savannah Guthrie’s mother says it’s frustrating that a camera at Nancy Guthrie’s...
